data.title: DoorDash partners with Hibbett, giving access to 1,000 stores for on-demand retail. Customers can order apparel, footwear, and accessories from top brands like Nike, Jordan, Adidas, and New Balance.
data.description: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) has recently partnered with Hibbett, Inc. to provide on-demand access to footwear, apparel, and accessories throughout the United States, leveraging around 1,000 stores. This collaboration aims to enhance the accessibility of Hibbett's products through DoorDash, particularly in the Southeast and Southwest regions. Customers now have the convenience to order various Hibbett athletic essentials, including footwear, apparel, and accessories from popular brands like Nike, Jordan, adidas, and New Balance through DoorDash for home delivery. Additionally, Hibbett will also be accessible via DashPass, offering more benefits to customers.

data.title: Engrain and Billee integrating to offer data-driven utility cost calculations for multifamily housing.
data.description: In Denver, a leading provider of interactive touring, mapping, and data visualization software for the built environment, Engrain, revealed a new partnership on Jan. 22, 2026. The integration will be with Billee, a contemporary utility billing platform specially designed for multifamily housing. This upcoming collaboration aims to combine Engrain's expertise in software solutions with Billee's innovative approach to utility billing within the multifamily housing sector.

data.title: Life Time's revenue up 12.2% to $745M in Q4, estimated profit rise to $123M. Full-year revenue up 14.2% to $2.995B, profit rise to $374M.
data.description: The anticipated total revenue is projected to rise by 12.2%, reaching a range of $743 million to $745 million for the fourth quarter. For the entire year, there is an estimated increase of 14.2%, with figures ranging from $2,993 million to $2,995 million. Regarding net income, there is a forecasted 226.6% increase, reaching between $120 million to $123 million for the fourth quarter. For the year in entirety, there is an estimated upsurge of 138.5%, with figures ranging between $371 million and $374 million.

data.title: McCormick posts strong 2025 financial results as a global leader in flavor; outlook for 2026 looks promising.
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, on January 22, 2026, McCormick & Company, Incorporated, a renowned flavor industry leader, shared its financial update for Q4 and fiscal year ending on November 30, 2025. The company (NYSE:MKC) also outlined its financial forecast for the year 2026. Key details include net sales figures and future projections.

data.title: Spire Global (NYSE: SPIR) chosen by AiDASH to enhance electric grid safety with satellite weather data.
data.description: Spire Global, Inc., a global provider of satellite data, analytics, and intelligence, recently announced that it was chosen by AiDASH, a prominent provider of vegetation, storm, and ignition risk intelligence, along with SatelliteFirst™ grid monitoring solutions. The partnership aims to bolster AiDASH's integrated solution for safeguarding the contemporary electric grid against vegetation and weather-related hazards. Spire, listed on the NYSE as SPIR, will supply advanced weather intelligence and data to augment AiDASH's offerings, improving grid security and resilience.

data.title: Thompson Street Capital Partners Portfolio acquires Long Pest Control, a premier provider of pest management solutions.
data.description: Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP), a St. Louis-based private equity firm, has revealed the purchase of Long Pest Control Inc.'s assets by PestCo Holdings, LLC (PestCo), a national pest control service provider catering to both residential and commercial clients and a part of TSCP's portfolio. Long Pest, established in 1979 in Tacoma, Washington, is known for its high-quality pest management services. This acquisition marks a significant move within the industry.

data.title: Spectrum Brands Holdings to reveal Q1 2026 results on Feb 5, 2026, after period ended Dec 28, 2025. Conducting live call and webcast.
data.description: In Middleton, Wisconsin, Spectrum Brands Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPB) disclosed its plan to unveil its financial results for the fiscal 2026 first quarter. The results, covering the period up to December 28, 2025, will be made public before the market opens on Thursday, February 5, 2026. Spectrum Brands, a prominent global company in consumer products and home essentials, emphasizes innovation and top-notch customer service. Alongside the results release, the company will host a live conference call and webcast on the specified date.

data.title: 2026 Forme highlighted for back health and alignment support in ergonomic wear due to increased discomfort from work and screens.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in New York, a notable shift towards recognizing the impact of poor posture on physical health has led to a surge in the popularity of ergonomic clothing within the wellness industry. The prolonged periods of sitting at work, higher screen usage, and limited physical activity have led to a significant increase in cases of back strain. As a result, more people are turning to ergonomic apparel to address these issues and improve their overall well-being.

data.title: GoldMining Inc. appoints Martin Dumont as VP of Corporate Development and Investor Relations on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: GoldMining Inc. (TSX: GOLD; NYSE American: GLDG) in Vancouver, BC disclosed the recruitment of Martin Dumont as the new Vice President, Corporate Development & Investor Relations. This news was declared on Jan. 22, 2026. Alastair Still, the current President and Chief Executive Officer, welcomed Dumont to the team.

data.title: Target Corporation declares $1.14 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on March 1, 2026, to shareholders Feb 11.
data.description: Target Corporation recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.14 per common share, approved by its board of directors. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 1, 2026, to shareholders who are officially recorded as of February 11, 2026. This decision comes as part of Target Corporation's first quarter initiatives.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility invests in Mokulele Airlines' Hawaii operations, aiming to bolster its airline network in Hawaii.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) announced an operational update regarding its Mokulele Airlines business. Mokulele Airlines is identified as a key asset within Surf Air Mobility's Hawaii network. It was noted that Mokulele holds the title of operating the most extensive airline network in Hawaii based on the number of airports served. Additionally, the airline boasts the highest number of scheduled departures among commuter airlines in Hawaii. Surf Air Mobility reiterated its dedication to ongoing investment in expanding its Hawaii network.

data.title: Greenoaks and Altimeter file legal actions against Korea for discrimination against Coupang and U.S. companies.
data.description: In San Francisco, U.S. Investors Greenoaks and Altimeter have filed two separate legal actions to protect American businesses and investors from discriminatory practices by the Government of the Republic of Korea. This move comes after continuous interference by the ROK Government in the Korean operations of Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG), a U.S.-based technology company. Coupang is publicly traded, and its stock is widely held.
